Good Luck Chuck (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,017,297Details
International Box Office $25,692,671
Worldwide Box Office $60,709,968
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $27,110,578
Total $27,110,578
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,652,001 (39.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.56 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,612 opening theaters/2,612 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $60,873,087

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 21st, 2007 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: January 15th, 2008 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of strong sexual content including crude dialogue, nudity, language and some drug use.
Running Time: 95 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Plot point: Curses, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Original Screenplay

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
